final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo using the provided letter "B" — a serif elegant style — with an eye symbol integrated in the center of the letter, similar to the reference logo provided.

Style/medium: elegant serif logo design, flat vector
Composition: the letter "B" centered, eye motif placed in the middle/interior of the letter B, balanced and symmetrical
Subject: logo mark combining the letter "B" (serif elegant) with an eye in the center
Scene/backdrop: transparent or white background
Lighting/mood: clean, refined, high-end
Color palette:
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim): B
Constraints:
  use the exact "B" letterform from the provided reference image #1
  eye design inspired by the reference logo in image #2
Avoid: decorative clutter, drop shadows, gradients
